common.errorSubtitle: Let's drop the needle again, the set isn't over.

home.title: radio.gofestivals
home.seoDescription: Discover hand-picked electronic music radio stations. Techno, house, trance, drum & bass and more, streaming live from across the world, connected to the gofestivals ecosystem.
home.featuredEmpty: No curated stations yet. Stay tuned.

genres.indexDescription: Browse every electronic music genre: techno, house, trance, drum & bass, dubstep and more. Curated stations, streaming live on radio.gofestivals.

consent.title: Your privacy
consent.body: We use browser storage to count plays, anonymously or linked to your account. Without your consent we record nothing.

countries.title: Countries
countries.indexDescription: Explore {count, plural, =1 {1 country} other {# countries}} with live electronic music stations: techno, house, trance and more.
countries.metaTitle: {name} electronic music radio — {count, plural, =1 {1 live station} other {# live stations}}
countries.metaDescription: Listen to {count, plural, =1 {the electronic music station} other {all # electronic music stations}} from {name} live. Techno, house, trance and more, free and no sign-up.
countries.intro: {name} contributes {count, plural, =1 {1 station} other {# stations}} to our electronic radio directory{hasTop, select, yes {; {topGenre} leads with {topCount, plural, =1 {1 station} other {# stations}}} other {}}.
